brand.subtitle: Climate & Health Early Warning · Central African Republic
brand.metaTitle: DGM Daily Weather Forecast — Transmission Form
brand.metaDescription: Climate & Health Early Warning System — Central African Republic

auth.signInDesc: Access the transmission form with your account credentials.
auth.loginError: Unable to sign in. Please try again.

wizard.stepBlockingFound: {count} issue(s) on this step — fix highlighted fields before continuing.
wizard.blockingBeforeSave: {count} blocking issue(s) — fix highlighted fields before saving.

metadata.title: Bulletin metadata
metadata.desc: General information entered once for this daily bulletin.
metadata.forecastDateWarn: The forecast date seems old. Please verify.
metadata.publicationTimeError: Please enter the bulletin publication time.
metadata.validityPeriodHint: Same as the forecast date, from 08:00 to 23:59.
metadata.dataSourcesPlaceholder: e.g. Surface observations; Eumetsat; NOAA; Windy; Ogimet
metadata.nationalForecastTextPlaceholder: Narrative summary of the national weather situation
metadata.nationalForecastTextError: Please enter the national forecast summary.
metadata.submissionStatusError: Please enter the submission status before finalizing the form.

nationalForecast.title: National weather forecast
nationalForecast.desc: One row per daily bulletin. Normal temperature fields are separate from feels-like temperature.

regionForecast.title: Weather forecast by region
regionForecast.desc: One row per administrative region. Health region codes are shown in brackets.
regionForecast.mandatoryHint: Mandatory per region: Min °C, Max °C, Feels-like °C, Humidity, Wind direction, Wind speed, Rainfall. Pressure and Sunshine are optional.

nationalHazard.title: National climate hazard risk analysis
nationalHazard.desc: Four hazard types are monitored: Heat wave, Flood, Strong wind, and Dust. A comment is mandatory if risk level is High or Very High.
nationalHazard.riskLevelError: Please select a valid risk level.
nationalHazard.affectedPrefecturesHint: Required if risk level is not None. All prefectures in the country are listed.
nationalHazard.riskCommentHint: Mandatory if risk level is High or Very High.
nationalHazard.riskCommentError: Please add a comment explaining this risk level.

regionHazard.title: Climate hazard risk by region
regionHazard.desc: Each region has four rows — one per hazard. If risk is anything other than "None," the affected prefectures within that region must be specified.
regionHazard.affectedPrefecturesHint: Required if risk level is not None. Only prefectures in this region are listed.
regionHazard.affectedPrefecturesError: Please indicate the affected prefectures within the region.
regionHazard.affectedPrefecturesWarn: Affected prefectures are empty. Please verify that the risk level is None.

interpretation.title: Meteorological interpretation
interpretation.desc: Free-text narrative interpretation of the daily bulletin. General situation is mandatory and should be more than 20 characters. Use {action} below to validate and save to the database.
interpretation.generalSituationError: Please enter the national meteorological interpretation.
interpretation.generalSituationWarn: The interpretation seems very short. Please verify whether it is sufficient.

weather.tempMinError: Minimum temperature must be a numeric value.
weather.tempMaxError: Maximum must be numeric and not lower than minimum.
weather.tempMaxWarn: The temperature value seems unusual (expected 5–50 °C). Please verify.
weather.feelsLikeError: Feels-like temperature must be a numeric value (expected 15–60 °C).
weather.feelsLikeWarn: Feels-like temperature seems unusual (expected 15–60 °C). Please verify.
weather.humidityError: Relative humidity must be between 0% and 100%.
weather.humidityWarn: Relative humidity must be between 0% and 100%.
weather.pressureError: Pressure must be a positive numeric value.
weather.pressureWarn: The atmospheric pressure value seems unusual (expected 950–1050 hPa). Please verify.
weather.windDirectionError: Please select a valid wind direction.
weather.windSpeedError: Wind speed must be numeric and between 0 and 30 m/s.
weather.windSpeedWarn: Wind speed must be between 0 and 30 m/s.
weather.rainfallError: Rainfall must be numeric and between 0 and 200 mm.
weather.rainfallWarn: The rainfall amount seems very high (above 200 mm). Please verify or confirm the information.
weather.sunshineError: Sunshine must be between 0 and 20 hours per day.

validation.forecastDateOld: The forecast date seems old. Please verify.
validation.publicationTimeMissing: Please enter the bulletin publication time.
validation.validityPeriodMissing: Please enter the forecast validity period.
validation.validityPeriodInconsistent: The validity period is inconsistent. The end time must be later than the start time.
validation.submissionStatusMissing: Please enter the submission status before finalizing the form.
validation.nationalForecastTextMissing: Please enter the national forecast summary.
validation.tempMinInvalid: {scope}: minimum temperature must be a numeric value (expected 5–50 °C).
validation.tempMaxInvalid: {scope}: maximum temperature must be a numeric value (expected 5–50 °C).
validation.tempMinHigherThanMax: {scope}: minimum temperature cannot be higher than maximum temperature.
validation.tempRangeWarning: {scope}: the temperature value seems unusual (expected 5–50 °C). Please verify.
validation.feelsLikeInvalid: {scope}: feels-like temperature must be a numeric value (expected 15–60 °C).
validation.feelsLikeRangeWarning: {scope}: feels-like temperature seems unusual (expected 15–60 °C). Please verify.
validation.thermalComfortInvalid: {scope}: feels-like temperature must be a numeric value (expected 15–60 °C).
validation.thermalComfortNumeric: {scope}: feels-like temperature must be a numeric value (expected 15–60 °C).
validation.humidityRangeError: {scope}: relative humidity must be between 0% and 100%.
validation.humidityWarning: {scope}: relative humidity must be between 0% and 100%.
validation.pressureError: {scope}: atmospheric pressure must be a positive numeric value (expected 950–1050 hPa).
validation.pressureWarning: {scope}: the atmospheric pressure value seems unusual (expected 950–1050 hPa). Please verify.
validation.windDirectionInvalid: {scope}: please select a valid wind direction.
validation.windSpeedInvalid: {scope}: wind speed must be a numeric value between 0 and 30 m/s.
validation.windSpeedNegative: {scope}: wind speed must be greater than or equal to 0 (0–30 m/s).
validation.windSpeedRangeError: {scope}: wind speed must be between 0 and 30 m/s.
validation.windSpeedWarning: {scope}: wind speed must be between 0 and 30 m/s.
validation.rainfallInvalid: {scope}: rainfall must be a numeric value between 0 and 200 mm.
validation.rainfallNegative: {scope}: rainfall must be between 0 and 200 mm.
validation.rainfallRangeError: {scope}: rainfall must be between 0 and 200 mm.
validation.rainfallWarning: {scope}: the rainfall amount seems very high (above 200 mm). Please verify or confirm the information.
validation.sunshineRangeError: {scope}: sunshine duration must be between 0 and 20 hours per day.
validation.riskLevelInvalid: Please select a valid risk level.
validation.nationalHazardRiskMissing: National hazard "{hazard}": please select a risk level.
validation.nationalHazardCommentMissing: Please add a comment explaining this risk level.
validation.heatWaveTempWarning: The heat wave risk level seems high compared with the temperature values. Please verify or confirm.
validation.floodRainWarning: The flood risk level seems high compared with the rainfall value entered. Please verify or confirm.
validation.windSpeedHazardWarning: The strong wind risk level seems high compared with the wind speed entered. Please verify or confirm.
validation.regionHazardCommentMissing: Please add a comment explaining this risk level.
validation.regionHazardPrefecturesMissing: Please indicate the affected prefectures within the region.
validation.regionHazardPrefecturesEmptyWarning: Affected prefectures are empty. Please verify that the risk level is None.
validation.interpretationMissing: Please enter the national meteorological interpretation.
validation.interpretationShort: The interpretation seems very short. Please verify whether it is sufficient.

dashboard.title: Linelist
dashboard.description: Weather bulletins — use the download icon to export a PDF, or the edit icon to update a bulletin.
dashboard.empty: No weather bulletins yet. Submit one from the transmission form.

admin.title: Linelist
admin.description: Manage weather bulletin records stored in PostgreSQL.

singleScreen.tagline: Climate & Health EWS · Central African Republic · single-screen entry
singleScreen.clearDraftConfirm: Clear the entire draft? This cannot be undone.

s1.title: Bulletin information
s1.subtitle: Date, validity window, sources and forecaster. One block for the whole bulletin.
s1.validityPeriodHint: Same as the forecast date, from 08:00 to 23:59.

s2.title: Weather forecast — national & regions
s2.subtitle: National row is highlighted at the top. Invalid values are blocked; unusual values are flagged in amber.
s2.copyNational: ⤓ Copy National values to all regions
s2.copyRow: Copy National values into this region
s2.legend: Required: Min °C, Max °C, Thermal comfort, Humidity, Wind direction, Wind speed, Rainfall. Red = blocking error, Amber = warning.

s3.title: Climate hazard risk — national & regions
s3.subtitle: National first, then each region. A comment is required for High / Very High. Affected prefectures are required per region when risk is not None.
s3.filterNote: Filter is a view convenience — all four are still required.
s3.commentRequired: Comment required (why is risk High/Very High?)
s3.prefecturesDisabled: Not required when risk is None
s3.tip: Tip: each region only shows the prefectures that belong to it (mapping from the DGM administrative découpage).

s4.title: Meteorological interpretation
s4.subtitle: Narrative national interpretation. Required — recommended minimum 20 characters.
s4.interpTip: Tip: mention current situation, expected evolution, risk areas and recommendations.

validation.title: Validation — {errors} error(s), {warnings} warning(s)
validation.passed: All checks passed. Bulletin is ready to submit.
